channel.title: Blue Cross VT News Mentions
channel.description: Mentions of BCBSVT, Blue Cross VT, and Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont from Vermont news outlets.

item.title: Google News Search: Blue Cross VT names Beth-Ann Roberts as next president and CEO - Vermont Business Magazine
item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Google News Search

Matched terms: Blue Cross VT, Blue Cross, Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont

Beth-Ann Roberts, president at Beth Israel Lahey Health Performance Network, has been selected as the next president and CEO at Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont, effective Jan. 10, 2026. Roberts will join Blue Cross VT as CEO-elect on Nov. 10, ensuring a smooth two-month transition with current President and CEO Don George, who will retire on Jan. 9, 2026. A respected and passiona ...

Read the original story

item.title: Google News Search: Vermont regulators approve a trimmed increase to 2026 health insurance premiums for large employers - VTDigger
item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Google News Search

Matched terms: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross

... double-digit increases to the premium rates that Vermont’s biggest health insurance provider can charge large employers next year. Vermont’s main health care regulator will allow Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont to increase the cost of health insurance premiums for Vermont employers with more than 100 employees by an average of 13.7% in 2026, according to a press release from the Green Mountain Care Board. The rate increase is expecte ...

Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:

Posted inHealth Financial struggles have pushed Vermont’s largest health insurer to the brink Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont has lost over $150 million in the past four years. If it fails, the state’s entire health care apparatus could fall apart, officials say. by Peter D'Auria May 7, 2025, 1:34 pmJune 6, 2025, 11:34 am Share this: Share on Fac ...

item.title: Google News Search: Blue Cross VT's reserve fund falls even lower: What is driving the freefall? - Burlington Free Press
item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:

... erve fund falls even lower: What is driving the freefall? Dan D'AmbrosioBurlington Free PressMarch 3, 2025Updated March 4, 2025, 8:24 a.m. ETBlue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont (BCBSVT) announced a $62.1 million deficit for 2024, citing a 15.5% increase in medical and drug costs.The insurer attributes the deficit to inadequate premium funding and escalating healthcare costs, particularly hospital and drug prices.BCBSVT's reserve fund ...

item.title: Brattleboro Reformer: Vermont DFR warns of potential health insurance scams
item.category: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Brattleboro Reformer

Matched terms: BCBSVT, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross, bluecrossvt.org

... ealth Plans are only available from Vermont Health Connect (VHC), which is administered by the Department of Vermont Health Access, or directly from the health insurance companies Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont (BCBSVT) and MVP Health Care. The annual open enrollment period for selecting a Qualified Health Plan is November 1, 2024, to January 15, 2025. While health insurance fraud scams occur throughout the year, scammers increase th ...

item.category: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Google News Search

... olvency because of its declining reserves, according to a state regulator.Kevin Gaffney, commissioner of the Vermont Department of Financial Regulation, said Friday he's confident BCBSVT will remain solvent, which is his department's responsibility to ensure."As solvency regulator, our primary role is protecting the market," Gaffney said. "We have to have a place for people to purchase insurance or we haven't done a good job of protecti ...

item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont

... hy McQuiston VermontBiz Vermonters are again facing steep premium growth for 2025 due to the cumulative impact of hospital costs, drug prices and state health care policy choices. Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont projects that these trends will continue and require rate increases of 16.3% for individual health plans and 19.1% for small-group plans for Vermonters covered by Vermont Health Connect. MVP Health Care is proposing an ave ...

item.title: Google News Search: Blue Cross VT just made it easier to get cheaper MRI scans at Vermont Open MRI - Burlington Free Press
item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Google News Search

Matched terms: Blue Cross VT, Blue Cross, Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont

... st medical insurance company is making it easier for patients to get cheaper MRIs at the only independent provider of the scans in the state − Vermont Open MRI in South Burlington.Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont announced on Monday that as of Feb. 1, 2024, it will no longer require prior authorization for health care providers to refer their patients to Vermont Open MRI. The cost of MRIs at Vermont Open MRI is four times lower tha ...

item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Google News Search

Matched terms: Blue Cross Vermont, Blue Cross, Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont

Kim Peake of Essex has been promoted to director of financial integrity at Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont, the state’s only local, nonprofit health plan. Peake has been at Blue Cross for 17 years; during that time has held several roles in underwriting, including associate underwriter, underwriter, senior underwriter and most ...

Emily Fair, Director of Customer Service at Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont (BCBSVT) has been recognized for her Call Center leadership with the prestigious First Call Resolution (FCR) Champion of the Year Award. This award is judged by a panel at Service Quality Metrics (SQM) who reviews leaders ...
